expectations.text: Output file is named exemple-prompt-A-1-2.txt (same base name as the source image, .txt extension)
Output contains only verbatim transcribed text, with no 'Summary' section (none was requested)
expectations.evidence: File has no '---'/'Summary:' block; content is the plain transcription only

expectations.text: Transcription accurately reflects the French text in the image without paraphrasing, translating, or summarizing it
expectations.evidence: Headers, bold markers, placeholders ({SUJET_OU_DOMAINE}, {OBJECTIF_UTILISATEUR}, etc.) and bullet structure all match the source image when compared directly

expectations.text: Output is non-empty and substantial enough to match the text density visible in the image
expectations.evidence: 26 lines covering the full visible prompt template, including the dense '## 2) Règles d'or' block

suggestions.reason: This image's text was small/dense but still legible enough that the without_skill baseline matched it almost exactly too — this eval doesn't strongly discriminate skill value. A noisier or lower-resolution image would test the skill's value-add more clearly.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions passed cleanly; not very discriminating against baseline on this particular image though.
